title: Method and system for implementing dynamic treatment environments based on patient information
abstract: A system that comprises a memory device storing instructions, and a processing device communicatively coupled to the memory device. The processing device executes the instructions to: receive user data obtained from records associated with a user; generate a modified treatment plan based on the user data; and send, to a treatment apparatus accessible to the user, the modified treatment plan, wherein the modified treatment plan causes the treatment apparatus to update at least one operational aspect of the treatment apparatus, and update at least one operational aspect of at least one other device communicatively coupled to the treatment apparatus.
claims: 1. A method for implementing dynamic treatment environments, the method comprising, at a server: receiving user data from records associated with a user; generating, based on the user data, a modified treatment; and sending, to a treatment apparatus accessible to the user, the modified treatment plan, wherein the treatment apparatus comprises a cycling machine, and the modified treatment plan causes the treatment apparatus to: update at least one operational aspect of the treatment apparatus, and update at least one operational aspect of at least one other device communicatively coupled to the treatment apparatus, wherein updating the at least one operational aspect of the treatment apparatus comprises: updating a virtual background displayed on a display device communicatively coupled to the treatment apparatus, and updating notification settings on the treatment apparatus.
